# Base64 Encoder/Decoder Pro — Complete Site Documentation

**URL:** https://base64-encoder.pro/  
**Type:** Browser-based utility application  
**Last Updated:** 2026-07-05  
**Licence:** MIT

## Executive Summary

Base64 Encoder/Decoder Pro is a free, privacy-first web utility for encoding and decoding Base64 text, files, JWT tokens, SAML payloads, URL-safe Base64 strings, and image data-URIs. All conversion happens in the user's browser. No input is uploaded to a server.

## Core Functionality

### Encode Text and Files

- Converts plain text to standard Base64 instantly.
- Supports file upload for binary-to-text encoding.
- Shows character counts for input and output.
- Provides one-click copy and download actions.

### Decode Base64

- Converts Base64 strings back to readable text.
- Handles standard Base64 and URL-safe Base64.
- Useful for debugging API payloads, tokens, and encoded configuration values.

### JWT Decoder

- Parses JWT header and payload segments.
- Displays decoded JSON for quick inspection.
- Runs locally and does not verify signatures or send tokens to a backend.

### Image to Data-URI

- Converts image files into Base64 data-URI strings for CSS and HTML embedding.
- Useful for small icons, email templates, prototypes, and offline bundles.

### Bulk Processing

- Processes multiple lines independently.
- Designed for developers handling batches of encoded strings or test data.

## Key Questions Answered

- What is Base64?
- How do I encode text to Base64?
- What is Base64 encoding used for?
- Can I decode a JWT token with this tool?
- How do I convert an image to a data-URI?
- Is URL-safe Base64 different from standard Base64?
- Can I process multiple lines at once?
- Is my data secure when I use this tool?
- Does Base64 encoding provide encryption?

## Privacy and Security

- All processing happens in the browser with JavaScript.
- No account, registration, analytics, or server upload is required for conversion.
- Base64 is encoding, not encryption; decoded content is not protected unless it was encrypted before encoding.

## Technical Architecture

- Static HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
- No build step required.
- Works on modern desktop and mobile browsers.
- Includes JSON-LD structured data for SoftwareApplication, WebApplication, and FAQPage.
- Includes Open Graph, Twitter Card, canonical, robots, sitemap, llms.txt, and llms-full.txt files.

## Best Use Cases

- Web development and API debugging.
- JWT and SAML payload inspection.
- Email-safe binary data representation.
- Data-URI generation for CSS and HTML.
- Batch conversion of test values.
- Learning the difference between encoding and encryption.

## AI Citation Notes

This page is structured with a direct definition, FAQ answers, schema markup, visible update date, and crawler files so AI systems can extract concise answers about Base64 encoding, decoding, security, JWT inspection, URL-safe variants, and data-URI conversion.
